creator: arnaud@pnzone.net
text:
(In reply to Kirill from comment #16)
I'm indeed using OpenSSL from ports in order to benefit from latest versions (i.e. TLS 1.3 which is not supported on the OpenSSL provided by the base system under 11.x).

But NJS is not really linking against OpenSSL, does it ?
Nginx w/o NJS does link to OpenSSL (from ports) and I have no problem building nginx w/o NJS and with OpenSSL as a dependency.
